[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101010 4
1 0111110 5
2 0000101 2
3 1001111 5
4 0010111 4
5 1101010 4
6 0111110 5
7 0011101 4

01 10 0111110 5 match 1 6
12 21 1100111 5
23 32 1101111 6
34 43 1111110 6
45 54 0111111 6
56 65 1111101 6
67 76 1111011 6
70 07 1111010 5

02 20 1111101 6
13 31 1101110 5
24 42 1111111 a
35 53 1111111 a
46 64 1111111 a
57 75 1111111 a
60 06 1111001 5
71 17 1110110 5

03 30 1111010 5
14 41 0111110 5 match 1 6
25 52 1111101 6
36 63 1101011 5
47 74 1111110 6
50 05 0011101 4 match 7
61 16 1101111 6
72 27 1110111 6

04 40 0111110 5 match 1 6
15 51 0111111 6
26 62 1101101 5
37 73 1111010 5
